finding_results.notes: Folded the flagged one-line 'He [verb]' bridges into surrounding paragraphs, replaced simple page-turn beats with document-specific pivots, and kept isolated short paragraphs only where they carry sharper impact rather than routine forward motion.
finding_results.summary: The chapter no longer advances through a run of four or more same-shaped one-sentence transition paragraphs; the file-reading descent and later signature beats now vary in syntax and paragraphing.

summary: Resolved the prose/copyedit rhythm finding by breaking the repeated isolated transition pattern while preserving the chapter's countdown, document descent, and Dominic-signature shock.
